meta.name: Spatially variable genes (Moran's I)
meta.description: Rank genes by spatial autocorrelation (Moran's I) over the spatial graph; the ranking lands in uns['moranI'] (top genes can then color the canvas).
meta.provenance: Adapted from the squidpy 'Moran's I' spatially-variable-genes vignette; targets the visium_hne example.

readme: Ranks genes by spatial autocorrelation (Moran's I) over a hexagonal-grid spatial graph. No `n_perms`: Moran's I is scored analytically here — the permutation path uses joblib's process pool, which can't spawn inside this app's worker thread.
